---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
::: {.row .align-items-center}
::: {.col-md-8}

# Pierpaolo Vendittelli

::: {.subtitle}
Postdoc Researcher · Medical AI & Computational Pathology
:::

::: {.location}
📍 Utrecht, The Netherlands &nbsp;·&nbsp; Open to Italy · Remote EU · US-remote
:::

I build deep-learning systems for digital pathology — from whole-slide image segmentation to multi-center clinical AI pipelines. My current work focuses on Wilms tumor grading at Prinses Maxima Centre; my PhD at Radboud UMC produced validated models for pancreatic cancer prognosis (PLOS ONE 2024). I also design LLM-based automation tools for research workflows.

I am actively seeking **R&D / Applied Scientist / ML Engineer** roles (finishing PhD June 2026).

::: {.cta-buttons}
<a class="btn-primary-custom" href="cv.qmd">View CV</a>
<a class="btn-secondary-custom" href="publications.qmd">Publications</a>
<a class="btn-secondary-custom" href="projects.qmd">Projects</a>
<a class="btn-secondary-custom" href="https://github.com/PierpaoloV" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
:::

:::
::: {.col-md-4 .text-center}
![](assets/profile.png){.profile-photo alt="Pierpaolo Vendittelli"}
:::
:::
:::
:::

---

## Research Interests

::: {.row}
::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.section-card}
### Computational Pathology
Whole-slide image analysis, multi-instance learning, segmentation, and survival prediction in oncology.
:::
:::
::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.section-card}
### Medical AI
End-to-end pipelines for clinical deployment — reproducible, multi-center, interpretable.
:::
:::
::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.section-card}
### LLM Agents & Automation
Production LLM pipelines for research workflows (paper triage, summarisation, scoring).
:::
:::
:::

---

## Selected Skills

<span class="skill-badge">Python</span>
<span class="skill-badge">PyTorch</span>
<span class="skill-badge">MONAI</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Hugging Face</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Docker</span>
<span class="skill-badge">GCP</span>
<span class="skill-badge">SLURM</span>
<span class="skill-badge">OpenAI API</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Anthropic API</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Git</span>
<span class="skill-badge">scikit-learn</span>
<span class="skill-badge">C++</span>
<span class="skill-badge">SQL</span>
